description_long: This is a modern swivel chair featuring a contoured, padded seat and backrest upholstered in a deep red fabric. The seat and backrest are ergonomically shaped with subtle geometric tufting, providing both comfort and visual interest. The chair is supported by a sturdy black metal central column that connects to a five-pointed star base, each arm of which ends in a smooth-rolling caster wheel for easy mobility. The base and casters are made of glossy black metal and plastic, giving the chair a sleek, professional appearance. There are no armrests, emphasizing a minimalist and space-saving design. A visible lever beneath the seat suggests adjustable height functionality.
description: A red, contoured swivel chair with a padded seat and backrest, supported by a black metal base with five caster wheels and no armrests. The chair features ergonomic shaping and a visible height adjustment lever.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, contoured red seat and backrest with geometric tufting, and the five-legged black base with casters.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ergonomic curve of the seat and backrest, as well as the central support column and adjustment lever.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, gently curved backrest and the full star-shaped base with all five casters visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat's profile, the central support, and the absence of armrests.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical black metal column, likely telescoping for height adjustment, connecting the seat to the five-pointed base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Wide, contoured, mid-height backrest with geometric tufting, upholstered in red fabric, and gently curved for ergonomic support.
